ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "xcoord" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the node on the floor plan */,
  "ycoord" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the node on the floor plan */,
  "floor" TEXT /* Floor where the node is located */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the node is located */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., CONF for conference room, DEPT for departmental office) */,
  "long_name" TEXT /* Long name of the node */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name or code for the node */,
  "team_assigned" TEXT /* Team assigned to manage the node */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people the room can accommodate */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status (e.g., available, booked, under maintenance) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_team_assigned FOREIGN KEY ("team_assigned") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_floor FOREIGN KEY ("floor") REFERENCES floors ("floor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_node_type FOREIGN KEY ("node_type") REFERENCES node_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_building FOREIGN KEY ("building") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the building */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the building */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries about the building */,
  "emergency_exit_map" TEXT /* URL to the emergency exit map of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "floors" (
  "floor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each floor */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the floor is located */,
  "floor_number" TEXT /* Number of the floor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the floor */,
  "total_area" INTEGER /* Total area of the floor in square meters */,
  "accessible_areas" TEXT /* Description of accessible areas for wheelchair users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("floor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the node type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node type */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the node is accessible to the public */,
  "min_staff_required" INTEGER /* Minimum number of staff required to operate the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the team */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "node_id" TEXT /* ID of the node where the resource is located */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next maintenance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_resources_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "node_id" TEXT /* ID of the node being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the node */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the node was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., enter, exit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the node was accessed */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_access_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, visitor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Level of access (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "node_id" TEXT /* ID of the node being reserved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the reservation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reservation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reservation */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the reservation */,
  "reservation_status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "reserver_name" TEXT /* Name of the person making the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_reservations_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_reservations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "node_id" TEXT /* ID of the node where the issue occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user reporting the issue */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., 1 for high, 2 for medium) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the team or staff member assigned to resolve the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_issues_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_issues_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "node_id" TEXT /* ID of the node being updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., maintenance, repair, upgrade) */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of completion for the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_updates_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)
